---
title: "Application: Dallas county (Texas)"
output: html_document
---

```{r, eval=F, echo=F}
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
filp <- 'vignettes/Application_Dallas.Rmd'
rmarkdown::render(filp)
system(paste0('brave vignettes/Application_Dallas.html'))
```

```{r, eval=T, message=F, warning=F, echo=F}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
source('../inst/script/application_dallas.R')
```

#### Step 1: Visual inspection

```{r}
gcda$plotly3d(partition=1)[[1]]
```

#### Step 2: Rotation matrix

#### Step 3: Regression

#### Step 4: Prediction

```{r, echo=F}
knitr::knit_exit()
```
